section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report**

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives - State: CA, District: 17
- [ ] Officer or Employee - Employing Office blank
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: blank

Received stamp: HAND DELIVERED; Legislative Resource Center; 2025 MAY -2 PM 4:10; Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives.

Transaction grid contains the printed example row and a first data row reading **Please see the attached**; actual transactions follow on attached pages.

uncertainties.read: Rohit Khanna Page 1 of 51; state CA
uncertainties.note: OCR misreads the handwritten page count/state, but the scan shows page 1 of 51 and Khanna district/state context is CA.
